TEAM STATS

Conference
North
Division
2022
Super Bowl Appearance
Orange & Black
Team Colors

Fun Facts:

  • 🐅 The Bengal tiger is the team mascot
  • 🏟️ Play at Paycor Stadium (formerly Paul Brown Stadium)
  • 🎯 Known for their explosive passing offense
  • 🏆 Made it to Super Bowl LVI in 2022
  • 👑 Rivals include Pittsburgh Steelers and Baltimore Ravens

BENGALS STARS

Joe Burrow

Position: Quarterback

Number: #9

Fun Fact: Won the Heisman Trophy at LSU and led the Bengals to their first Super Bowl in 33 years!

Ja'Marr Chase

Position: Wide Receiver

Number: #1

Fun Fact: 2021 Offensive Rookie of the Year and Joe Burrow's college teammate!

Tee Higgins

Position: Wide Receiver

Number: #5

Fun Fact: Known for making incredible catches and standing 6'4" tall!

Joe Mixon

Position: Running Back

Number: #28

Fun Fact: One of the most versatile backs in the NFL!
